acceptance_criteria: Notifications appear after: being mentioned, being followed, getting a favourite/reblog; pagination works; types filter works; notifications from both local and remote actors appear; notification is correctly marked as read after GET
description: Implement the notifications timeline. Returns paginated notification objects of kinds: mention, favourite, reblog, follow, follow_request. Each notification includes the from account and optionally the related status. Supports max_id, since_id, min_id, limit, types[], exclude_types[] params.
design: Notification.id = notifications.id as string. from_account: full Account object. status: full Status object if kind is mention/favourite/reblog. Notification kinds: mention, favourite, reblog, follow, follow_request. Mark notifications as read: update read_at on fetch (or on separate mark-as-read endpoint).
title: GET /api/v1/notifications
